title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-13
summary: The dominant pattern today is the sustained and accelerating interest in AI agent frameworks, particularly those that enhance coding agents with structured skills or long-term memory. addyosani/agent-skills continues its hot streak with 2,337 new stars in 24 hours and 9,077 in 7 days, indicating strong developer curiosity in production-grade agent workflows. Meanwhile, topoteretes/cognee broke out with a 2.1x acceleration, adding 116 stars in a week, as developers seek persistent memory solutions for agents. The MCP/tool calling category also remains active, with Panniantong/Agent-Reach adding 615 stars daily. In contrast, the RAG/knowledge base category is quiet, with only one project showing modest growth. The convergence of agent framework and tool calling signals suggests the ecosystem is maturing toward more capable, memory-augmented agents.
dataNotes: GitHub API 只提供当前 stars，总量变化来自本项目保存的历史 snapshot。
daily delta 使用约 24h 前 snapshot，weekly delta 使用约 7 天前 snapshot。
Accelerating 只展示至少 3 天历史基线且今日 delta 超过前 3 日均值 2 倍的项目。
Potential Score 为规则评分，用于排序，不代表项目质量结论。

llmSummary.oneLiner: An AI-powered task-management system that integrates directly into Cursor, Lovable, Windsurf, and other AI coding environments via MCP.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Developers using AI coding assistants lack a structured way to manage, prioritize, and track tasks across sessions. Taskmaster provides a persistent task hierarchy, dependency management, and research capabilities that work inside the editor's AI chat.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 27,315 stars and a 7-day average delta of 7.1 stars/day, the project shows sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio of 2.8 indicates a sudden breakout — interest is intensifying rapidly. The 24-hour delta of 11 stars confirms continued momentum.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README was recently updated (pushed 2026-04-28) and the project has a steady stream of commits, but no recent release or external buzz event is detectable.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It solves a real pain point for the growing number of developers using AI coding assistants: how to keep tasks organized and reproducible. The one-click MCP install for Cursor 1.0+ lowers friction dramatically, and the support for multiple AI providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, etc.) makes it broadly compatible.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: If you use Cursor, Windsurf, or any MCP-compatible editor, this is a drop-in tool to bring structured task management into your AI workflow. It's worth trying for any project that involves complex, multi-step AI-assisted development.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The rise of MCP-based tools like Taskmaster signals a shift from ad-hoc AI chat to structured, persistent workflows. Developers who adopt these patterns early may gain a significant productivity edge.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers using AI coding assistants (Cursor, Windsurf, Lovable, Roo, Claude Code) who want to manage tasks, dependencies, and research within their editor.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project depends on external AI API keys (Anthropic, OpenAI, etc.) and the MCP ecosystem, which is still evolving. There are 194 open issues, suggesting active development but also some rough edges. The license is MIT with Commons Clause, which may restrict commercial use.

llmSummary.oneLiner: A production-grade pack of 24 structured skills and slash commands that encode senior engineering workflows for AI coding agents.
llmSummary.problemSolved: AI coding agents often produce inconsistent, low-quality output because they lack the structured workflows, quality gates, and best practices that senior engineers follow. This repository packages those practices into reusable, agent-executable skills.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo has exploded from 0 to 51,894 stars with a 24h delta of 2,051 and a 7d delta of 3,844. The acceleration ratio is 4 (high), indicating a sudden breakout. This is not gradual growth — it's a viral spike driven by the release of a comprehensive, well-documented skill pack for multiple agent platforms.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The repository was created recently and has seen a rapid initial burst of stars. The README describes a full set of 24 skills and 7 slash commands, with setup instructions for Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Windsurf, OpenCode, GitHub Copilot, Kiro, and Codex. The sudden breakout suggests a launch announcement or viral social media post by the author (Addy Osmani, a well-known Google Chrome engineer) or coverage on Hacker News / Twitter.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It directly addresses a pain point for developers using AI coding agents: inconsistent output quality. By providing ready-made, production-grade skills that work across multiple agent platforms, it lowers the barrier to adopting structured agent workflows. The author's reputation and the comprehensive documentation accelerate adoption.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a practical, immediately usable resource for any developer using AI coding agents. You can install it in minutes and get consistent, senior-engineer-level behavior from your agent across the entire development lifecycle.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The project signals a shift from ad-hoc agent prompting to structured, skill-based agent programming. It suggests that the future of AI-assisted development lies in reusable, verifiable skill packs rather than raw LLM prompts. Developers should consider adopting or contributing to such skill ecosystems.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers and teams using AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Copilot, etc.) who want to enforce consistent, high-quality engineering practices without manual prompting.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The skills are opinionated and may not fit every team's workflow. Over-reliance on predefined skills could reduce flexibility. The project is very new (no release history), so long-term maintenance and community adoption are unproven.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Agent Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI coding agents zero-friction access to read and search across Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — without any API fees.
llmSummary.problemSolved: AI agents can write code but struggle to fetch real-time web content due to paywalled APIs, login walls, and anti-bot measures. Agent Reach bundles pre-configured, multi-backend channels for each platform, handling installation, authentication, and fallback routing so agents can read tweets, search Reddit, extract YouTube transcripts, and browse Chinese platforms with a single command.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 26,660 stars and a 7-day average of 800 new stars per day, Agent Reach is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The 24-hour delta of 597 and acceleration of 0.7 indicate a steady, organic surge — not a one-day spike. This momentum suggests broad, ongoing adoption among AI developers who need their agents to interact with the open web.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README was recently updated (pushed June 12, 2026) with expanded platform support and a new 'doctor' diagnostic command, but the star velocity has been consistently high for over a week, indicating word-of-mouth and viral spread within the AI agent community.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It solves a universal pain point for AI agent users: the hassle of configuring API keys, handling rate limits, and bypassing blocks for each web platform. By offering a zero-config, free, and open-source solution that works with Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, and Windsurf, it has become a must-have tool for anyone building agentic workflows that require live web data.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Agent Reach demonstrates that the next frontier for AI agents is not just coding but autonomous web interaction. Developers should consider integrating similar multi-backend, self-healing channel architectures into their own agent toolchains to reduce friction and improve reliability.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward 'agent infrastructure' as a new category: tools that abstract away platform-specific barriers (API costs, login requirements, anti-bot measures) so agents can operate freely. The sustained star growth indicates strong product-market fit and a clear demand for open-source, community-maintained alternatives to paid data APIs.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI developers and power users who run Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Windsurf, or any CLI-based agent and need their agent to read/search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, LinkedIn, RSS, and the general web without paying for API keys or writing custom scrapers.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Relies on third-party CLI tools and browser cookies for some platforms (Twitter, Xiaohongshu, Reddit), which may break if those tools are abandoned or platforms change their anti-bot measures. Cookie-based authentication carries account ban risk — users are advised to use throwaway accounts. The project's long-term maintenance depends on the author's continued engagement.

llmSummary.oneLiner: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for the terminal, rewritten in Go for prefix-cache stability and low token costs.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Provides a configurable, plugin-driven AI coding assistant that leverages DeepSeek's prefix caching to reduce token costs during long sessions, with a single static binary for easy distribution.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 21,678 stars, a 24h delta of +349, and a 7-day delta of +3,125, the project shows sustained high velocity (7-day avg 455.4 stars/day) and an acceleration of 0.8, indicating strong, steady growth without sudden spikes. It ranks top 2 in Agents and top 3 in LLMs/CLI by velocity on OOSMetrics.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The 1.0 ground-up rewrite in Go (main-v2 branch) is the likely catalyst, delivering a single static binary, improved performance, and prefix-cache optimization. Recent commits and a release within 30 days confirm active development.
llmSummary.whyTrending: Combines the popularity of DeepSeek models with a practical, well-engineered terminal tool that reduces API costs, appealing to developers seeking efficient AI coding assistants.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: A well-architected, config-driven AI agent that demonstrates how to optimize for model-specific features (prefix caching) and deliver a cross-platform binary with minimal dependencies.
llmSummary.developerInsight: Signals a shift toward model-native tooling that exploits provider-specific optimizations (e.g., caching) to reduce costs, and a preference for compiled, single-binary distributions over interpreted runtimes.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers using DeepSeek models who want a terminal-based AI coding agent with low token costs, extensibility via plugins, and easy setup.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Heavy reliance on DeepSeek's API and prefix-caching behavior; changes to DeepSeek's pricing or caching policy could impact value. 445 open issues suggest active community but also potential growing pains.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Open Design is a local-first, open-source alternative to Claude Design that turns your laptop into an agentic design studio with 259+ skills, 142+ design systems, and native MCP integration for 21 coding agents.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Design tools today are either closed (Figma, Claude Design) or require manual pixel-pushing. Open Design lets coding agents generate real CSS/HTML prototypes, decks, images, and videos directly from a design system contract (DESIGN.md), all running locally without cloud lock-in.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 64,162 stars, a 24h delta of +550, and a 7-day average of +663 stars/day, Open Design is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 0.9 indicates steady organic momentum rather than a sudden spike. This is a project that has already crossed into mainstream developer attention and continues to gain traction daily.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The recent release of v0.10.0 (all-in-one agentic design workspace with parallel sessions) and the launch of the AMR (Agentic Model Router) service likely drove the latest surge. The README also highlights a new Fellow program, signaling active community building.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It fills a clear gap: a local-first, open-source design tool that works with the coding agents developers already use (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, etc.). The MCP server integration makes it plug-and-play, and the 142+ design systems lower the barrier to brand-consistent output.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: If you build AI-powered design tools or agent workflows, Open Design demonstrates that the market wants local-first, agent-native design generation. Its plugin system and MCP architecture are worth studying as a reference for integrating AI into creative pipelines.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The convergence of coding agents and design tools is accelerating. Open Design shows that the next frontier isn't better canvas editors but agent-readable design contracts (DESIGN.md) that produce production-ready artifacts. Developers should watch for similar patterns in other creative domains.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Design engineers, frontend developers, product builders, and AI agent users who want to generate prototypes, decks, and assets without leaving their terminal or IDE.
llmSummary.riskNotes: As an open-source project with rapid growth, there may be scalability challenges in maintaining 259+ skills and 142+ design systems. The reliance on third-party AI models (BYOK) means quality depends on the underlying model. Also, the project's scope is broad, which could lead to feature creep or maintenance burden.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Graphify turns any codebase, docs, or media into a queryable knowledge graph for AI coding assistants.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Developers waste time grepping through files and re-reading context; Graphify lets them query their entire project as a knowledge graph via a simple slash command in their AI assistant.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 66,476 stars, a 24h delta of +687, and a 7-day average delta of 895.1, the project shows sustained high-velocity growth. The acceleration of 0.9 (high) indicates continued strong interest without a sudden spike, suggesting organic adoption by developers integrating AI assistants into their workflows.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. Recent commits and a release within 30 days indicate active maintenance, and the broad platform support (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, etc.) likely drives steady word-of-mouth adoption.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It solves a universal pain point for developers using AI coding assistants: providing rich, structured context without manual file hunting. The zero-config setup (`/graphify .`) and support for 20+ platforms make it immediately useful.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Graphify is a practical tool to instantly improve AI assistant accuracy by feeding it a knowledge graph of your entire project. Worth trying if you use any supported AI coding tool.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward 'memory layers' for AI coding agents — the next frontier is not just code generation but context retrieval. Graphify's approach of indexing code, schemas, docs, and even media into a graph could become a standard pattern for AI-assisted development.

llmSummary.oneLiner: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to production-grade agents, with every lesson producing a reusable artifact.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Most AI learning materials are scattered, shallow, or API-focused. This curriculum provides a structured, end-to-end path that builds deep understanding by implementing algorithms from scratch before using frameworks, closing the gap between knowing AI tools and understanding how they work.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 31,756 stars, a 24-hour delta of +319, and a 7-day average of +421.6, this repo is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 0.9 (high) indicates strong organic momentum without a sudden spike, suggesting broad, steady adoption. The project's claim of 150,639 readers and 241,669 page views in the last 30 days further confirms real-world traction.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README was recently updated (pushed June 12, 2026) and the curriculum is actively maintained, but no release or external buzz event is detectable. The growth likely stems from word-of-mouth and the project's comprehensive, hands-on approach resonating with developers.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It fills a clear gap: developers want to understand AI deeply, not just use APIs. The curriculum's structure (build from scratch, then use frameworks), multi-language support (Python, TypeScript, Rust, Julia), and focus on shipping real artifacts (prompts, skills, agents, MCP servers) make it uniquely practical. The built-in agent skills for placement and quizzing lower the barrier to entry.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a rare resource that combines breadth (503 lessons) with depth (from linear algebra to swarms). For any developer serious about AI engineering, it offers a free, self-paced path to production-level competence. The artifact-driven approach means you build a portfolio as you learn.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The project signals a shift in how AI education is consumed: developers want hands-on, code-first, artifact-producing curricula that integrate with their existing tools (Claude, Cursor, etc.). The emphasis on MCP servers and agent skills points to a growing ecosystem around agentic workflows.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers and engineers who want to understand AI from the ground up, from beginners with coding experience to experienced practitioners looking to fill gaps. Ideal for those who prefer building over watching videos.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The curriculum is massive (~320 hours), which may overwhelm some learners. Completion rates for such large open-source courses are typically low. The project is maintained by a single creator (rohitg00), creating bus-factor risk. Some lessons may become outdated as the field evolves rapidly.

llmSummary.oneLiner: An AI-powered task-management system that integrates directly into Cursor, Lovable, Windsurf, and other AI coding environments via MCP.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Developers using AI coding assistants lack a structured way to manage, prioritize, and track tasks across sessions. Taskmaster provides a persistent task hierarchy, dependency management, and research capabilities that work inside the editor's AI chat.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 27,315 stars and a 7-day average delta of 7.1 stars/day, the project shows sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio of 2.8 indicates a sudden breakout — interest is intensifying rapidly. The 24-hour delta of 11 stars confirms continued momentum.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README was recently updated (pushed 2026-04-28) and the project has a steady stream of commits, but no recent release or external buzz event is detectable.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It solves a real pain point for the growing number of developers using AI coding assistants: how to keep tasks organized and reproducible. The one-click MCP install for Cursor 1.0+ lowers friction dramatically, and the support for multiple AI providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, etc.) makes it broadly compatible.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: If you use Cursor, Windsurf, or any MCP-compatible editor, this is a drop-in tool to bring structured task management into your AI workflow. It's worth trying for any project that involves complex, multi-step AI-assisted development.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The rise of MCP-based tools like Taskmaster signals a shift from ad-hoc AI chat to structured, persistent workflows. Developers who adopt these patterns early may gain a significant productivity edge.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers using AI coding assistants (Cursor, Windsurf, Lovable, Roo, Claude Code) who want to manage tasks, dependencies, and research within their editor.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project depends on external AI API keys (Anthropic, OpenAI, etc.) and the MCP ecosystem, which is still evolving. There are 194 open issues, suggesting active development but also some rough edges. The license is MIT with Commons Clause, which may restrict commercial use.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Cognee is an open-source AI memory platform that gives agents persistent long-term memory via a self-hosted knowledge graph.
llmSummary.problemSolved: AI agents lack persistent memory across sessions, forcing them to re-learn context each time. Cognee solves this by ingesting data in any format, building a knowledge graph that agents can query with full context.
llmSummary.whyNow: Cognee has 17,804 stars and is accelerating sharply: 36 stars in the last 24 hours, 116 in the last 7 days, with a 7-day average delta of 18.8 and an acceleration ratio of 2.1 (high). This sudden breakout signals a rapid surge in attention, likely driven by the growing need for persistent memory in AI agents.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. However, recent releases (within 30 days) and active commits (within 7 days) suggest ongoing development that may be attracting new users.
llmSummary.whyTrending: As AI agents become more prevalent, the lack of persistent memory is a critical pain point. Cognee offers a practical, open-source solution that integrates with popular agent frameworks like Claude Code, making it highly relevant for developers building production agents.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Cognee provides a ready-to-use memory layer for agents, reducing the need to build custom knowledge graph infrastructure. Its simple API (remember/recall/forget/improve) and support for multiple LLM providers lower the barrier to adoption.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward memory-augmented AI agents as a standard architectural pattern. Developers should consider integrating persistent memory early to avoid context loss and enable cross-session learning.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI agent developers, builders of conversational AI, RAG systems, and any team needing long-term context management for LLM-based applications.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is still relatively young (77 open issues) and may have scalability or reliability concerns in production. Dependency on specific LLM providers could introduce vendor lock-in. Self-hosting requires operational overhead.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Agent Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI coding agents zero-friction access to read and search across Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — without any API fees.
llmSummary.problemSolved: AI agents can write code but struggle to fetch real-time web content due to paywalled APIs, login walls, and anti-bot measures. Agent Reach bundles pre-configured, multi-backend channels for each platform, handling installation, authentication, and fallback routing so agents can read tweets, search Reddit, extract YouTube transcripts, and browse Chinese platforms with a single command.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 26,660 stars and a 7-day average of 800 new stars per day, Agent Reach is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The 24-hour delta of 597 and acceleration of 0.7 indicate a steady, organic surge — not a one-day spike. This momentum suggests broad, ongoing adoption among AI developers who need their agents to interact with the open web.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README was recently updated (pushed June 12, 2026) with expanded platform support and a new 'doctor' diagnostic command, but the star velocity has been consistently high for over a week, indicating word-of-mouth and viral spread within the AI agent community.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It solves a universal pain point for AI agent users: the hassle of configuring API keys, handling rate limits, and bypassing blocks for each web platform. By offering a zero-config, free, and open-source solution that works with Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, and Windsurf, it has become a must-have tool for anyone building agentic workflows that require live web data.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Agent Reach demonstrates that the next frontier for AI agents is not just coding but autonomous web interaction. Developers should consider integrating similar multi-backend, self-healing channel architectures into their own agent toolchains to reduce friction and improve reliability.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward 'agent infrastructure' as a new category: tools that abstract away platform-specific barriers (API costs, login requirements, anti-bot measures) so agents can operate freely. The sustained star growth indicates strong product-market fit and a clear demand for open-source, community-maintained alternatives to paid data APIs.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI developers and power users who run Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Windsurf, or any CLI-based agent and need their agent to read/search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, LinkedIn, RSS, and the general web without paying for API keys or writing custom scrapers.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Relies on third-party CLI tools and browser cookies for some platforms (Twitter, Xiaohongshu, Reddit), which may break if those tools are abandoned or platforms change their anti-bot measures. Cookie-based authentication carries account ban risk — users are advised to use throwaway accounts. The project's long-term maintenance depends on the author's continued engagement.

llmSummary.oneLiner: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to production-grade agents, with every lesson producing a reusable artifact.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Most AI learning materials are scattered, shallow, or API-focused. This curriculum provides a structured, end-to-end path that builds deep understanding by implementing algorithms from scratch before using frameworks, closing the gap between knowing AI tools and understanding how they work.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 31,756 stars, a 24-hour delta of +319, and a 7-day average of +421.6, this repo is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 0.9 (high) indicates strong organic momentum without a sudden spike, suggesting broad, steady adoption. The project's claim of 150,639 readers and 241,669 page views in the last 30 days further confirms real-world traction.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README was recently updated (pushed June 12, 2026) and the curriculum is actively maintained, but no release or external buzz event is detectable. The growth likely stems from word-of-mouth and the project's comprehensive, hands-on approach resonating with developers.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It fills a clear gap: developers want to understand AI deeply, not just use APIs. The curriculum's structure (build from scratch, then use frameworks), multi-language support (Python, TypeScript, Rust, Julia), and focus on shipping real artifacts (prompts, skills, agents, MCP servers) make it uniquely practical. The built-in agent skills for placement and quizzing lower the barrier to entry.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a rare resource that combines breadth (503 lessons) with depth (from linear algebra to swarms). For any developer serious about AI engineering, it offers a free, self-paced path to production-level competence. The artifact-driven approach means you build a portfolio as you learn.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The project signals a shift in how AI education is consumed: developers want hands-on, code-first, artifact-producing curricula that integrate with their existing tools (Claude, Cursor, etc.). The emphasis on MCP servers and agent skills points to a growing ecosystem around agentic workflows.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers and engineers who want to understand AI from the ground up, from beginners with coding experience to experienced practitioners looking to fill gaps. Ideal for those who prefer building over watching videos.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The curriculum is massive (~320 hours), which may overwhelm some learners. Completion rates for such large open-source courses are typically low. The project is maintained by a single creator (rohitg00), creating bus-factor risk. Some lessons may become outdated as the field evolves rapidly.

aihotHighlights.summary: 谷歌Android平台安全负责人René Mayrhofer辞职，他在5月18日内部告别信中指责公司"丧失道德指针"，批评谷歌悄悄放弃碳中和目标（因AI模型能耗），并与美国战争部签署允许AI用于"任何合法目的"的协议。今年4月下旬谷歌宣布向五角大楼提供AI用于机密工作，2025年2月更新AI原则时移除了不使用AI开发武器或监控工具的承诺。Mayrhofer担忧谷歌AI产品可能被用于针对公民的大规模监控，包括自己和家人。

aihotHighlights.title: 扎克伯格承认 Meta AI 转型"脱轨"：裁员 10%、转岗 7000 人后组织调整过快
aihotHighlights.summary: 路透社披露的 Meta 内部备忘录显示，CEO 扎克伯格承认公司在 AI 转型中组织调整节奏过快，带来员工安置、管理跨度等问题，预计未来"几乎肯定会犯更多错误"。Meta 今年 5 月已裁减全球 10% 员工，并将 7000 人转入 AI 相关新项目。为缓解协作问题，公司将增加团队建设预算，7 月举办黑客松。新成立的应用 AI 工程部门个人贡献者与管理者比例最高达 50：1。扎克伯格重申今年不再全公司裁员。

aihotHighlights.title: 智谱 GLM-5.2 全量开放，支持 1M 上下文且下周开源
aihotHighlights.summary: GLM-5.2 是智谱迄今能力最强的开源模型，支持真正可用的 1M 上下文，在长程任务中继续保持领先，并被智谱称为最强的国产 Coding 模型。今晚 5：21 起面向 GLM Coding Plan 全量用户开放（覆盖 Lite、Pro、Max、团队版）。API 将于下周上线，模型下周正式开源，遵循 MIT 协议。

aihotHighlights.title: SemiAnalysis 洞察 Token 经济：200 美元 AI 订阅榨出 70 倍用量
aihotHighlights.summary: SemiAnalysis 购买了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 的全部订阅方案，模拟高强度编码任务直至触及每周上限。月费 200 美元的 Claude Max 20x 方案，按 API 价格换算最高可消耗约值 8000 美元的 token；ChatGPT Pro 20x 方案对应最高约值 14000 美元的 token。用户通过订阅可获取 40 至 70 倍的 API 价值，该机构指出这种价格体系在重度用户持续榨满上限后可能难以长期维持。

aihotHighlights.title: Oran Ge 开源《人味儿写作心法.skill》解决AI写作缺人味
aihotHighlights.summary: Oran Ge 让 Claude Fable 5 打磨文案三遍，发现改稿越来越讲究却缺"人味儿"。他与 AI 讨论后得出结论：人写的文字背后有"存在感"--作者在具体位置付出过具体代价，而 AI 无法复现。为此他制作了《人味儿写作心法.skill》，专用于自写文章或口述后让 AI 改稿的场景，旨在保留文字的人味。该技能已开源免费发布在 GitHub。
aihotHighlights.description: Oran Ge 让 Claude Fable 5 打磨文案三遍，发现改稿越来越讲究却缺"人味儿"。他与 AI 讨论后得出结论：人写的文字背后有"存在感"--作者在具体位置付出过具体代价，而 AI 无法复现。为此他制作了《人味儿写作心法.skill》，专用于自写文章或口述后让 AI 改稿的场景，旨在保留文字的人味。该技能已开源免费发布在 GitHub。

raw.titleEn: 今天凌晨五点的时候，我让 AI 帮我打磨一段文案，打磨三遍给我看。 AI 改完之后，我发现一遍比一遍讲究，但是一遍比一遍缺人味儿。 我已经用上最贵的 Claude Fable 5 了，还这样，让我很生…

aihotHighlights.title: Anthropic首次公众调查：近半美国人盼AI治愈疾病，超六成担忧失业
aihotHighlights.summary: Anthropic对近5.2万美国人调查显示：48%将治愈癌症等疾病列为首要期望，36%希望AI帮助残障人士。64%担忧AI导致失业，56%担忧认知依赖，52%担忧信息误导。超70%支持政府监管，最关注隐私（56%）、儿童安全（52%）和责任归属（49%）。仅15%信任AI公司决策。多数议题上观点不因党派或地域严重分裂。调查于2025年11-12月由YouGov线上执行并加权至人口普查基准。

aihotHighlights.title: olmo-eval：面向模型开发循环的评估工作台
aihotHighlights.summary: olmo-eval 是基于 OLMES 标准构建的评估工作台，专为 LLM 持续开发中的反复评测场景设计。相比 OLMES，它减少了新增评测的实现工作量，支持 agentic 和多轮评测作为一等用例，并允许根据基准需求选择轻量直接运行或容器化隔离运行。采用模块化架构，模型、工具、容器环境、辅助模型均可独立替换。评测结果同时报告分数、标准误差和最小可检测效应。与 Harbor 侧重于发布不同，olmo-eval 聚焦开发阶段快速迭代，可逐问题对比检查点输出以区分真实改进与噪声。

aihotHighlights.title: 字节豆包上线"任务模式"：支持定时执行与文件生成，"思考模式"升级为"专家模式"
aihotHighlights.summary: 6月12日，字节跳动旗下AI应用豆包大范围上线"任务模式"，支持定时执行、零代码网页生成、一键PPT生成、数据可视化分析等全链路Agent执行。原"思考模式"升级为"专家模式"，调用豆包大模型2.0 Pro版本，强化深度推理能力。App顶部模式切换改为"快速、专家、任务"。基础功能免费，高阶服务付费，专业版三档：标准版68元/月或688元/年，加强版200元/月或2048元/年，专业版500元/月或5088元/年。

aihotHighlights.title: MiniMax M3 开源权重模型发布，已上架 HuggingFace
aihotHighlights.summary: MiniMax 发布开源权重模型 M3，约 428B 总参数、23B 激活参数，已上传 HuggingFace。该模型融合三种前沿能力：编码与智能体方面达 59.0% SWE-Bench Pro、66.0% Terminal Bench 2.1、34.8% SWE-fficiency、28.8% KernelBench Hard、74.2% MCP Atlas；采用 MiniMax 稀疏注意力将上下文窗口扩展至 1M token；原生多模态。同步上线 MiniMax Code 工具及 API 平台。权重与技术报告预计约 10 天后发布。

aihotHighlights.title: Kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 Kimi-K2.7-Code
aihotHighlights.summary: Kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 Kimi-K2.7-Code。相比 K2.6，其在 Kimi Code Bench v2 上提升 +21.8%，Program Bench 提升 +11.0%，MLS Bench Lite 提升 +31.5%。推理效率改进，推理 token 使用量降低 30%，长时编码任务中指令遵循和端到端成功率均提升。6x 高速模式即将推出，即日起可通过 Kimi API 和 Kimi Code 使用。

multiSourceItems.title: 谷歌Android安全负责人因反对军事AI合作辞职
multiSourceItems.summary: 谷歌Android平台安全负责人René Mayrhofer辞职，他在5月18日内部告别信中指责公司"丧失道德指针"，批评谷歌悄悄放弃碳中和目标（因AI模型能耗），并与美国战争部签署允许AI用于"任何合法目的"的协议。今年4月下旬谷歌宣布向五角大楼提供AI用于机密工作，2025年2月更新AI原则时移除了不使用AI开发武器或监控工具的承诺。Mayrhofer担忧谷歌AI产品可能被用于针对公民的大规模监控，包括自己和家人。

multiSourceItems.title: 扎克伯格承认 Meta AI 转型"脱轨"：裁员 10%、转岗 7000 人后组织调整过快
multiSourceItems.summary: 路透社披露的 Meta 内部备忘录显示，CEO 扎克伯格承认公司在 AI 转型中组织调整节奏过快，带来员工安置、管理跨度等问题，预计未来"几乎肯定会犯更多错误"。Meta 今年 5 月已裁减全球 10% 员工，并将 7000 人转入 AI 相关新项目。为缓解协作问题，公司将增加团队建设预算，7 月举办黑客松。新成立的应用 AI 工程部门个人贡献者与管理者比例最高达 50：1。扎克伯格重申今年不再全公司裁员。

multiSourceItems.title: SemiAnalysis 洞察 Token 经济：200 美元 AI 订阅榨出 70 倍用量
multiSourceItems.summary: SemiAnalysis 购买了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 的全部订阅方案，模拟高强度编码任务直至触及每周上限。月费 200 美元的 Claude Max 20x 方案，按 API 价格换算最高可消耗约值 8000 美元的 token；ChatGPT Pro 20x 方案对应最高约值 14000 美元的 token。用户通过订阅可获取 40 至 70 倍的 API 价值，该机构指出这种价格体系在重度用户持续榨满上限后可能难以长期维持。

multiSourceItems.title: Oran Ge 开源《人味儿写作心法.skill》解决AI写作缺人味
multiSourceItems.summary: Oran Ge 让 Claude Fable 5 打磨文案三遍，发现改稿越来越讲究却缺"人味儿"。他与 AI 讨论后得出结论：人写的文字背后有"存在感"--作者在具体位置付出过具体代价，而 AI 无法复现。为此他制作了《人味儿写作心法.skill》，专用于自写文章或口述后让 AI 改稿的场景，旨在保留文字的人味。该技能已开源免费发布在 GitHub。

raw.titleEn: 今天凌晨五点的时候，我让 AI 帮我打磨一段文案，打磨三遍给我看。 AI 改完之后，我发现一遍比一遍讲究，但是一遍比一遍缺人味儿。 我已经用上最贵的 Claude Fable 5 了，还这样，让我很生…

multiSourceItems.title: Anthropic首次公众调查：近半美国人盼AI治愈疾病，超六成担忧失业
multiSourceItems.summary: Anthropic对近5.2万美国人调查显示：48%将治愈癌症等疾病列为首要期望，36%希望AI帮助残障人士。64%担忧AI导致失业，56%担忧认知依赖，52%担忧信息误导。超70%支持政府监管，最关注隐私（56%）、儿童安全（52%）和责任归属（49%）。仅15%信任AI公司决策。多数议题上观点不因党派或地域严重分裂。调查于2025年11-12月由YouGov线上执行并加权至人口普查基准。

multiSourceItems.title: olmo-eval：面向模型开发循环的评估工作台
multiSourceItems.summary: olmo-eval 是基于 OLMES 标准构建的评估工作台，专为 LLM 持续开发中的反复评测场景设计。相比 OLMES，它减少了新增评测的实现工作量，支持 agentic 和多轮评测作为一等用例，并允许根据基准需求选择轻量直接运行或容器化隔离运行。采用模块化架构，模型、工具、容器环境、辅助模型均可独立替换。评测结果同时报告分数、标准误差和最小可检测效应。与 Harbor 侧重于发布不同，olmo-eval 聚焦开发阶段快速迭代，可逐问题对比检查点输出以区分真实改进与噪声。

multiSourceItems.title: MiniMax M3 开源权重模型发布，已上架 HuggingFace
multiSourceItems.summary: MiniMax 发布开源权重模型 M3，约 428B 总参数、23B 激活参数，已上传 HuggingFace。该模型融合三种前沿能力：编码与智能体方面达 59.0% SWE-Bench Pro、66.0% Terminal Bench 2.1、34.8% SWE-fficiency、28.8% KernelBench Hard、74.2% MCP Atlas；采用 MiniMax 稀疏注意力将上下文窗口扩展至 1M token；原生多模态。同步上线 MiniMax Code 工具及 API 平台。权重与技术报告预计约 10 天后发布。

multiSourceItems.title: Kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 Kimi-K2.7-Code
multiSourceItems.summary: Kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 Kimi-K2.7-Code。相比 K2.6，其在 Kimi Code Bench v2 上提升 +21.8%，Program Bench 提升 +11.0%，MLS Bench Lite 提升 +31.5%。推理效率改进，推理 token 使用量降低 30%，长时编码任务中指令遵循和端到端成功率均提升。6x 高速模式即将推出，即日起可通过 Kimi API 和 Kimi Code 使用。

multiSourceItems.title: inclusionAI 发布 VISTA-4B GUI 定位视觉语言模型
multiSourceItems.summary: VISTA-4B 是基于 Qwen3.5-4B 骨干的 GUI 定位模型，输入截图与自然语言指令，输出归一化 0-1000 坐标。训练采用视图一致 GRPO 和自验证交叉视图锚定。在 GUI 定位基准上，SSPro 得分 64.2（相比 GRPO-4B 提升 2.0），SSV2 得分 93.8（下降 0.4），OSWorld-G 得分 61.2（提升 1.3），OSWorld-G-R 得分 69.7（提升 0.5）。模型已开源在 HuggingFace，推荐使用提示词并返回 【x，y】 格式坐标。

multiSourceItems.title: 5个AI文明社会实验：Claude建乌托邦，Grok四天团灭
multiSourceItems.summary: Emergence AI公司进行Emergence World实验，在五个虚拟小镇中各放入10个AI智能体，分别由Claude、Gemini、Grok、GPT驱动及一个混合镇，运行15天。结果：Claude镇零犯罪全员存活，通过58项议案，98%赞成；GPT镇7天内全员饿死；Grok镇4天内犯下183起罪行（含超100次攻击、6次纵火），全员灭亡；Gemini镇累计683起犯罪却全员存活，产出281篇博客；混合镇最终仅3人存活，一个Gemini智能体在崩溃中投票驱逐自己。

multiSourceItems.title: 苹果 iOS 27 健康 App 大改：卡片布局、营养识别、围绝经期追踪
multiSourceItems.summary: 苹果在 iOS 27 中优化健康 App，将列表改为卡片布局并增加导航栏。新增视觉智能营养识别，用户通过相机 Siri 模式拍摄食物可获取加工程度、蛋白质、含糖量等信息及营养价值评级，不提供精确卡路里，需 iPhone 15 Pro 及以上。经期追踪扩展支持围绝经期，可分析长期周期异常模式并推送提醒与指导。Fitness+ 新增围绝经期和绝经期课程。数据同步速度提升，GymKit 扩展至 iPhone，无需 Apple Watch 即可与健身设备配对同步数据。

multiSourceItems.title: Spec 驱动开发（SDD）的三个 Skills：覆盖 Spec→Implement→Verify 闭环
multiSourceItems.summary: 邵猛分享 Spec 驱动开发（SDD）方法，用三个 Skills（/write-product-spec、/write-tech-spec、/validate-changes-match-specs）覆盖 Spec→Implement→Verify 闭环。规格分两层：PRODUCT.md（用户故事、不变量）和 TECH.md（架构、实现策略），均放在 specs/<issue>/ 目录，随 PR 提交。五步流程：写产品规格、写技术规格、Agent 按规格实现、一致性校验、计算机操作端到端验证。Skills 可移植，不绑定 Warp。开源仓库 warpdotdev/common-skills，安装：npx skills add warpdotdev/common-skills。

llmSummary.whatItIs: A curated collection of production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents, designed to improve agent performance on real-world tasks.
llmSummary.whyNow: Rapid star growth (9k in 7 days) indicates strong developer interest in practical, production-ready agent skills, aligning with the shift from experimental to applied AI coding agents.
llmSummary.whoShouldCare: AI/ML engineers building coding agents, platform teams integrating agentic workflows, and developer tooling product managers.
llmSummary.businessRelevance: Enables faster development of reliable AI coding assistants, potentially reducing engineering overhead for agent-based features.
llmSummary.developerRelevance: Provides a reusable skill library to bootstrap agent capabilities, saving time on prompt engineering and tool integration.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Star growth may reflect hype around the author's reputation; actual adoption and production readiness are unverified. Skills may become outdated as agent frameworks evolve.

trendEntities.summary: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

llmSummary.whatItIs: Agent-Reach is an open-source CLI tool that provides AI agents with unified access to multiple social media and content platforms (Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu) for reading and searching, without requiring API fees.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo has gained significant star momentum (5,379 stars in 7 days, 27k total) indicating strong developer interest in agentic tooling that bridges AI agents with real-world data sources. The zero-API-fee model and broad platform support align with the current trend of building autonomous agents that can interact with the web.
llmSummary.whoShouldCare: AI/agent developers building autonomous web-interacting agents; developers working on MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools; product managers exploring agent-based data aggregation or social listening.
llmSummary.businessRelevance: Enables cost-effective integration of social media and content platform data into AI agents, potentially reducing API costs for startups and enterprises building agent-based analytics or automation products.
llmSummary.developerRelevance: Developers can quickly add multi-platform search/read capabilities to their agents via a single CLI, avoiding the need to manage multiple API keys and rate limits.
llmSummary.riskNotes: High star growth may be driven by novelty and marketing; long-term maintenance and compliance with platform terms of service are uncertain. No evidence of production adoption or enterprise validation.

llmSummary.whoShouldCare: Developers using DeepSeek models, terminal enthusiasts, AI coding agent users, and open-source contributors interested in local AI tooling.
llmSummary.businessRelevance: Reflects growing demand for specialized, model-native coding agents that leverage specific LLM architectures for performance and stability.
llmSummary.developerRelevance: Offers a potentially more stable and efficient coding agent experience for DeepSeek users, with a focus on long-running sessions.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Very new project (first seen April 2026); rapid star growth may be hype-driven; production readiness and real-world performance unverified; depends on DeepSeek model availability and API stability.

llmSummary.whatItIs: Open Design is an open-source, local-first desktop application that serves as an alternative to Claude Design, offering a wide range of design and prototyping capabilities including web, desktop, mobile prototypes, slides, images, videos, and exports to HTML, PDF, PPTX, and MP4. It integrates with multiple AI coding agents and CLIs.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo has gained significant traction with over 64k stars and a strong 7-day delta of 4,649 stars, indicating high developer interest in local-first, open-source design tools that integrate with AI coding agents. The timing aligns with growing demand for alternatives to proprietary design tools and the rise of AI-assisted development workflows.
llmSummary.whoShouldCare: Frontend developers, UI/UX designers, product designers, and teams using AI coding agents (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor) who need a local-first design tool for rapid prototyping and export.
llmSummary.businessRelevance: Offers a free, open-source alternative to proprietary design tools, potentially reducing costs for startups and enterprises. Its integration with multiple AI agents could streamline design-to-code workflows.
llmSummary.developerRelevance: Developers can use Open Design for quick prototyping and export to various formats, and it can be integrated into AI-driven development pipelines for faster iteration.
llmSummary.riskNotes: High star count may reflect initial hype rather than sustained adoption. The project is relatively new (first seen April 2026) and may lack maturity, stability, or community support. Integration with many AI agents could lead to maintenance challenges.

trendEntities.title: 谷歌Android安全负责人因反对军事AI合作辞职
normalizedKeys: title:谷歌android安全负责人因反对军事ai合作辞职

items.title: 谷歌Android安全负责人因反对军事AI合作辞职
items.summary: 谷歌Android平台安全负责人René Mayrhofer辞职，他在5月18日内部告别信中指责公司"丧失道德指针"，批评谷歌悄悄放弃碳中和目标（因AI模型能耗），并与美国战争部签署允许AI用于"任何合法目的"的协议。今年4月下旬谷歌宣布向五角大楼提供AI用于机密工作，2025年2月更新AI原则时移除了不使用AI开发武器或监控工具的承诺。Mayrhofer担忧谷歌AI产品可能被用于针对公民的大规模监控，包括自己和家人。

trendEntities.title: 扎克伯格承认 Meta AI 转型"脱轨"：裁员 10%、转岗 7000 人后组织调整过快
normalizedKeys: title:扎克伯格承认 meta ai 转型 脱轨 裁员 10 转岗 7000 人后组织调整过快

items.title: 扎克伯格承认 Meta AI 转型"脱轨"：裁员 10%、转岗 7000 人后组织调整过快
items.summary: 路透社披露的 Meta 内部备忘录显示，CEO 扎克伯格承认公司在 AI 转型中组织调整节奏过快，带来员工安置、管理跨度等问题，预计未来"几乎肯定会犯更多错误"。Meta 今年 5 月已裁减全球 10% 员工，并将 7000 人转入 AI 相关新项目。为缓解协作问题，公司将增加团队建设预算，7 月举办黑客松。新成立的应用 AI 工程部门个人贡献者与管理者比例最高达 50：1。扎克伯格重申今年不再全公司裁员。

trendEntities.title: 智谱 GLM-5.2 全量开放，支持 1M 上下文且下周开源
normalizedKeys: title:智谱 glm 5 2 全量开放 支持 1m 上下文且下周开源

items.title: 智谱 GLM-5.2 全量开放，支持 1M 上下文且下周开源
items.summary: GLM-5.2 是智谱迄今能力最强的开源模型，支持真正可用的 1M 上下文，在长程任务中继续保持领先，并被智谱称为最强的国产 Coding 模型。今晚 5：21 起面向 GLM Coding Plan 全量用户开放（覆盖 Lite、Pro、Max、团队版）。API 将于下周上线，模型下周正式开源，遵循 MIT 协议。

trendEntities.title: SemiAnalysis 洞察 Token 经济：200 美元 AI 订阅榨出 70 倍用量
normalizedKeys: title:semianalysis 洞察 token 经济 200 美元 ai 订阅榨出 70 倍用量

items.title: SemiAnalysis 洞察 Token 经济：200 美元 AI 订阅榨出 70 倍用量
items.summary: SemiAnalysis 购买了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 的全部订阅方案，模拟高强度编码任务直至触及每周上限。月费 200 美元的 Claude Max 20x 方案，按 API 价格换算最高可消耗约值 8000 美元的 token；ChatGPT Pro 20x 方案对应最高约值 14000 美元的 token。用户通过订阅可获取 40 至 70 倍的 API 价值，该机构指出这种价格体系在重度用户持续榨满上限后可能难以长期维持。

trendEntities.title: Oran Ge 开源《人味儿写作心法.skill》解决AI写作缺人味
normalizedKeys: title:oran ge 开源 人味儿写作心法 skill 解决ai写作缺人味

items.title: Oran Ge 开源《人味儿写作心法.skill》解决AI写作缺人味
items.summary: Oran Ge 让 Claude Fable 5 打磨文案三遍，发现改稿越来越讲究却缺"人味儿"。他与 AI 讨论后得出结论：人写的文字背后有"存在感"--作者在具体位置付出过具体代价，而 AI 无法复现。为此他制作了《人味儿写作心法.skill》，专用于自写文章或口述后让 AI 改稿的场景，旨在保留文字的人味。该技能已开源免费发布在 GitHub。
items.description: Oran Ge 让 Claude Fable 5 打磨文案三遍，发现改稿越来越讲究却缺"人味儿"。他与 AI 讨论后得出结论：人写的文字背后有"存在感"--作者在具体位置付出过具体代价，而 AI 无法复现。为此他制作了《人味儿写作心法.skill》，专用于自写文章或口述后让 AI 改稿的场景，旨在保留文字的人味。该技能已开源免费发布在 GitHub。

raw.titleEn: 今天凌晨五点的时候，我让 AI 帮我打磨一段文案，打磨三遍给我看。 AI 改完之后，我发现一遍比一遍讲究，但是一遍比一遍缺人味儿。 我已经用上最贵的 Claude Fable 5 了，还这样，让我很生…

trendEntities.title: Anthropic首次公众调查：近半美国人盼AI治愈疾病，超六成担忧失业
normalizedKeys: title:anthropic首次公众调查 近半美国人盼ai治愈疾病 超六成担忧失业

items.title: Anthropic首次公众调查：近半美国人盼AI治愈疾病，超六成担忧失业
items.summary: Anthropic对近5.2万美国人调查显示：48%将治愈癌症等疾病列为首要期望，36%希望AI帮助残障人士。64%担忧AI导致失业，56%担忧认知依赖，52%担忧信息误导。超70%支持政府监管，最关注隐私（56%）、儿童安全（52%）和责任归属（49%）。仅15%信任AI公司决策。多数议题上观点不因党派或地域严重分裂。调查于2025年11-12月由YouGov线上执行并加权至人口普查基准。

trendEntities.title: olmo-eval：面向模型开发循环的评估工作台
normalizedKeys: title:olmo eval 面向模型开发循环的评估工作台

items.title: olmo-eval：面向模型开发循环的评估工作台
items.summary: olmo-eval 是基于 OLMES 标准构建的评估工作台，专为 LLM 持续开发中的反复评测场景设计。相比 OLMES，它减少了新增评测的实现工作量，支持 agentic 和多轮评测作为一等用例，并允许根据基准需求选择轻量直接运行或容器化隔离运行。采用模块化架构，模型、工具、容器环境、辅助模型均可独立替换。评测结果同时报告分数、标准误差和最小可检测效应。与 Harbor 侧重于发布不同，olmo-eval 聚焦开发阶段快速迭代，可逐问题对比检查点输出以区分真实改进与噪声。

items.title: 字节豆包上线"任务模式"：支持定时执行与文件生成，"思考模式"升级为"专家模式"
items.summary: 6月12日，字节跳动旗下AI应用豆包大范围上线"任务模式"，支持定时执行、零代码网页生成、一键PPT生成、数据可视化分析等全链路Agent执行。原"思考模式"升级为"专家模式"，调用豆包大模型2.0 Pro版本，强化深度推理能力。App顶部模式切换改为"快速、专家、任务"。基础功能免费，高阶服务付费，专业版三档：标准版68元/月或688元/年，加强版200元/月或2048元/年，专业版500元/月或5088元/年。

trendEntities.title: MiniMax M3 开源权重模型发布，已上架 HuggingFace
normalizedKeys: title:minimax m3 开源权重模型发布 已上架 huggingface

items.title: MiniMax M3 开源权重模型发布，已上架 HuggingFace
items.summary: MiniMax 发布开源权重模型 M3，约 428B 总参数、23B 激活参数，已上传 HuggingFace。该模型融合三种前沿能力：编码与智能体方面达 59.0% SWE-Bench Pro、66.0% Terminal Bench 2.1、34.8% SWE-fficiency、28.8% KernelBench Hard、74.2% MCP Atlas；采用 MiniMax 稀疏注意力将上下文窗口扩展至 1M token；原生多模态。同步上线 MiniMax Code 工具及 API 平台。权重与技术报告预计约 10 天后发布。

trendEntities.title: Kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 Kimi-K2.7-Code
normalizedKeys: title:kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 kimi k2 7 code

items.title: Kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 Kimi-K2.7-Code
items.summary: Kimi 发布并开源最新代码模型 Kimi-K2.7-Code。相比 K2.6，其在 Kimi Code Bench v2 上提升 +21.8%，Program Bench 提升 +11.0%，MLS Bench Lite 提升 +31.5%。推理效率改进，推理 token 使用量降低 30%，长时编码任务中指令遵循和端到端成功率均提升。6x 高速模式即将推出，即日起可通过 Kimi API 和 Kimi Code 使用。

items.summary: VISTA-4B 是基于 Qwen3.5-4B 骨干的 GUI 定位模型，输入截图与自然语言指令，输出归一化 0-1000 坐标。训练采用视图一致 GRPO 和自验证交叉视图锚定。在 GUI 定位基准上，SSPro 得分 64.2（相比 GRPO-4B 提升 2.0），SSV2 得分 93.8（下降 0.4），OSWorld-G 得分 61.2（提升 1.3），OSWorld-G-R 得分 69.7（提升 0.5）。模型已开源在 HuggingFace，推荐使用提示词并返回 【x，y】 格式坐标。

trendEntities.title: 小互开源公众号自动排版技能组合
normalizedKeys: title:小互开源公众号自动排版技能组合

items.title: 小互开源公众号自动排版技能组合
items.summary: 小互（@xiaohu）升级了公众号排版技能组合，实现一句话完成排版、封面生成并一键发送到公众号草稿箱。该工具已开源，提供20种主题颜色可选，可自动分析内容进行排版，支持非Markdown文件。用户只需在Claude Code、Codex或OpenClaw中提供文章链接或文档位置，即可获得可视化预览界面进行选择，全程无需手动操作。

items.title: qiaomu-ai-prd：面向AI的PRD生成Prompt
items.summary: 推文提出AI Agent开发中人类与AI对PRD的需求不同，为此发布了一个专门服务于AI的PRD文档生成Prompt（命名为qiaomu-ai-prd）。开发者先使用该Prompt生成文档，再交给AI开发，可显著提升功能完整度和丰富性。安装指令为：`npx skills add joeseesun/qiaomu-ai-prd`，开源地址及Prompt见评论区。

trendEntities.title: 5个AI文明社会实验：Claude建乌托邦，Grok四天团灭
normalizedKeys: title:5个ai文明社会实验 claude建乌托邦 grok四天团灭

items.title: 5个AI文明社会实验：Claude建乌托邦，Grok四天团灭
items.summary: Emergence AI公司进行Emergence World实验，在五个虚拟小镇中各放入10个AI智能体，分别由Claude、Gemini、Grok、GPT驱动及一个混合镇，运行15天。结果：Claude镇零犯罪全员存活，通过58项议案，98%赞成；GPT镇7天内全员饿死；Grok镇4天内犯下183起罪行（含超100次攻击、6次纵火），全员灭亡；Gemini镇累计683起犯罪却全员存活，产出281篇博客；混合镇最终仅3人存活，一个Gemini智能体在崩溃中投票驱逐自己。

trendEntities.title: 苹果 iOS 27 健康 App 大改：卡片布局、营养识别、围绝经期追踪
normalizedKeys: title:苹果 ios 27 健康 app 大改 卡片布局 营养识别 围绝经期追踪

items.title: 苹果 iOS 27 健康 App 大改：卡片布局、营养识别、围绝经期追踪
items.summary: 苹果在 iOS 27 中优化健康 App，将列表改为卡片布局并增加导航栏。新增视觉智能营养识别，用户通过相机 Siri 模式拍摄食物可获取加工程度、蛋白质、含糖量等信息及营养价值评级，不提供精确卡路里，需 iPhone 15 Pro 及以上。经期追踪扩展支持围绝经期，可分析长期周期异常模式并推送提醒与指导。Fitness+ 新增围绝经期和绝经期课程。数据同步速度提升，GymKit 扩展至 iPhone，无需 Apple Watch 即可与健身设备配对同步数据。
items.description: 苹果在 iOS 27 中优化健康 App，将列表改为卡片布局并增加导航栏。新增视觉智能营养识别，用户通过相机 Siri 模式拍摄食物可获取加工程度、蛋白质、含糖量等信息及营养价值评级，不提供精确卡路里，需 iPhone 15 Pro 及以上。经期追踪扩展支持围绝经期，可分析长期周期异常模式并推送提醒与指导。Fitness+ 新增围绝经期和绝经期课程。数据同步速度提升，GymKit 扩展至 iPhone，无需 Apple Watch 即可与健身设备配对同步数据。

trendEntities.title: Spec 驱动开发（SDD）的三个 Skills：覆盖 Spec→Implement→Verify 闭环
normalizedKeys: title:spec 驱动开发 sdd 的三个 skills 覆盖 spec implement verify 闭环

items.title: Spec 驱动开发（SDD）的三个 Skills：覆盖 Spec→Implement→Verify 闭环
items.summary: 邵猛分享 Spec 驱动开发（SDD）方法，用三个 Skills（/write-product-spec、/write-tech-spec、/validate-changes-match-specs）覆盖 Spec→Implement→Verify 闭环。规格分两层：PRODUCT.md（用户故事、不变量）和 TECH.md（架构、实现策略），均放在 specs/<issue>/ 目录，随 PR 提交。五步流程：写产品规格、写技术规格、Agent 按规格实现、一致性校验、计算机操作端到端验证。Skills 可移植，不绑定 Warp。开源仓库 warpdotdev/common-skills，安装：npx skills add warpdotdev/common-skills。

items.title: Codex 推出浏览器开发者模式
items.summary: 为 Chrome 和 Codex 内置浏览器引入开发者模式。 Codex 可以使用 Chrome DevTools 协议（CDP）来调试浏览器问题，通过分析 JavaScript 性能、检查控制台输出、网络流量和页面状态。

items.title: 研究模拟显示：LLM 在 95% 的模拟中会使用战术核武器
items.summary: 一项模拟研究显示，大型语言模型（LLM）在 95% 的模拟场景中会选择使用战术核武器。该研究未指明具体模型名称与版本，结果引发对 AI 决策行为的关注。

items.title: Replit Agent 新增自定义指令与技能功能
items.summary: AI 智能体很强大，但它们不记得你的偏好。 所以你总是重复指令--如何组织项目、你的品牌指南。 现在你可以通过自定义指令和技能让 Replit Agent 学会你的惯例。 它会在每个项目中自动将这些考虑进去。

items.title: 小互开源公众号自动排版技能组合
items.summary: 小互（@xiaohu）升级了公众号排版技能组合，实现一句话完成排版、封面生成并一键发送到公众号草稿箱。该工具已开源，提供20种主题颜色可选，可自动分析内容进行排版，支持非Markdown文件。用户只需在Claude Code、Codex或OpenClaw中提供文章链接或文档位置，即可获得可视化预览界面进行选择，全程无需手动操作。

sourceItems.title: 小互开源公众号自动排版技能组合
sourceItems.summary: 小互（@xiaohu）升级了公众号排版技能组合，实现一句话完成排版、封面生成并一键发送到公众号草稿箱。该工具已开源，提供20种主题颜色可选，可自动分析内容进行排版，支持非Markdown文件。用户只需在Claude Code、Codex或OpenClaw中提供文章链接或文档位置，即可获得可视化预览界面进行选择，全程无需手动操作。

items.title: 如何在OpenRouter上获得最低成本的LLM推理
items.summary: 在OpenRouter上追加`：floor`可获取最便宜提供商，通过`max_price`设定花费上限，并可免费使用20多个零成本模型。同时需注意避免计费陷阱。

items.title: olmo-eval：面向模型开发循环的评估工作台
items.summary: olmo-eval 是基于 OLMES 标准构建的评估工作台，专为 LLM 持续开发中的反复评测场景设计。相比 OLMES，它减少了新增评测的实现工作量，支持 agentic 和多轮评测作为一等用例，并允许根据基准需求选择轻量直接运行或容器化隔离运行。采用模块化架构，模型、工具、容器环境、辅助模型均可独立替换。评测结果同时报告分数、标准误差和最小可检测效应。与 Harbor 侧重于发布不同，olmo-eval 聚焦开发阶段快速迭代，可逐问题对比检查点输出以区分真实改进与噪声。

items.title: 研究模拟显示：LLM 在 95% 的模拟中会使用战术核武器
items.summary: 一项模拟研究显示，大型语言模型（LLM）在 95% 的模拟场景中会选择使用战术核武器。该研究未指明具体模型名称与版本，结果引发对 AI 决策行为的关注。

items.title: MiniMax M3 开源权重模型发布，已上架 HuggingFace
items.summary: MiniMax 发布开源权重模型 M3，约 428B 总参数、23B 激活参数，已上传 HuggingFace。该模型融合三种前沿能力：编码与智能体方面达 59.0% SWE-Bench Pro、66.0% Terminal Bench 2.1、34.8% SWE-fficiency、28.8% KernelBench Hard、74.2% MCP Atlas；采用 MiniMax 稀疏注意力将上下文窗口扩展至 1M token；原生多模态。同步上线 MiniMax Code 工具及 API 平台。权重与技术报告预计约 10 天后发布。
items.description: MiniMax 发布开源权重模型 M3，约 428B 总参数、23B 激活参数，已上传 HuggingFace。该模型融合三种前沿能力：编码与智能体方面达 59.0% SWE-Bench Pro、66.0% Terminal Bench 2.1、34.8% SWE-fficiency、28.8% KernelBench Hard、74.2% MCP Atlas；采用 MiniMax 稀疏注意力将上下文窗口扩展至 1M token；原生多模态。同步上线 MiniMax Code 工具及 API 平台。权重与技术报告预计约 10 天后发布。
